sources.name: zillow_zori_zip
sources.attribution: Zillow Research, Zillow Observed Rent Index ZIP time series
sources.notes: Monthly ZIP-level rent price index used for historical rent movement and volatility.

sources.name: zillow_inventory_zip
sources.attribution: Zillow Research, ZIP inventory time series
sources.notes: Housing inventory signal used with rent prices to study market pressure. Replace with a rental-inventory feed when one is licensed.

sources.name: nyc_housing_units_by_building
sources.attribution: NYC Open Data, Housing New York Units by Building
sources.notes: Building-level housing production and affordability unit signal.

sources.name: nyc_dob_approved_permits
sources.attribution: NYC Open Data, DOB NOW: Build - Approved Permits

sources.name: mta_subway_stations
sources.attribution: State of New York Open Data, MTA Subway Stations and Complexes
sources.notes: Station, accessibility, and service metadata for transit access signals.

sources.name: listing_snapshots
sources.attribution: Configurable public or partner rental listing feed
sources.notes: This local seed keeps development runnable. Set RENT_PULSE_LISTINGS_URL to an approved public CSV/JSON listing feed for production amenities and listing-churn tracking.
